Project Goal:

Build an Analytics Migration Onboarding Agent.

Requirements:

1. Runs entirely in client environment.
2. No cloud deployment.
3. No external APIs.
4. Detect new datasets.
5. Infer schemas from CSV files.
6. Generate Bronze table DDL.
7. Generate control table SQL.
8. Generate documentation.
9. Use Python.
10. Generate simple beginner-friendly code.
